category_sources: Official UPX homepage describes UPX as an executable packer and file compressor.
source_facts.description says it compresses and expands executable files.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and README identify the project as UPX, the Ultimate Packer for eXecutables.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points to full documentation in the repository doc directory.
Official homepage is the primary project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/upx/upx, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes supported executable formats and CLI usage.
source_facts.description describes executable compression and expansion.
